items.name: House Bloom Latte
items.description: Our signature espresso with steamed oat milk and a hint of lavender honey.

items.name: Garden Espresso
items.description: Double shot of single-origin Ethiopian espresso with bright citrus notes.

items.name: Mocha Fern
items.description: Rich dark chocolate blended with espresso and topped with cocoa dust.

items.name: Cold Brew Botanica
items.description: Slow-steeped 18-hour cold brew served over ice with a sprig of fresh mint.

items.name: Cappuccino Classic
items.description: Perfectly balanced espresso, steamed milk, and velvety foam.

items.name: Greenhouse Matcha
items.description: Ceremonial-grade matcha whisked with your choice of milk and vanilla.

items.name: Chamomile Garden
items.description: Whole chamomile flowers steeped with dried apple and a touch of honey.

items.name: Earl Grey Bloom
items.description: Bergamot-infused black tea with dried cornflower petals and cream.

items.name: Hibiscus Iced Tea
items.description: Tart and refreshing hibiscus tea served chilled with fresh lemon.

items.name: Rosemary Focaccia Toast
items.description: Warm house-baked focaccia with rosemary butter and flaky sea salt.

items.name: Lemon Poppyseed Muffin
items.description: Bright and tender muffin with fresh lemon zest and a crumble topping.

items.name: Almond Croissant
items.description: Flaky butter croissant filled with frangipane and topped with sliced almonds.

items.name: Banana Walnut Bread
items.description: Moist banana bread loaded with toasted walnuts, served warm.

items.name: Turmeric Golden Latte
items.description: Anti-inflammatory turmeric, ginger, and cinnamon in warm oat milk.

items.name: Lavender Honey Affogato
items.description: Vanilla bean gelato drowned in a shot of espresso with lavender honey drizzle.

items.name: Rose Cardamom Chai
items.description: Spiced chai brewed with crushed cardamom pods and rosewater finish.
